message:
fix(ci): Initialize Binaryen submodules for googletest

Add 'git submodule update --init --depth 1' after cloning
Binaryen to fetch the googletest dependency required by CMake.

Fixes: Cannot find source file: googletest/googletest/src/gtest_main.cc

files.patch:
@@ -66,6 +66,7 @@ jobs:
           sudo apt-get install -y cmake ninja-build
           git clone --depth 1 --branch version_119 https://github.com/WebAssembly/binaryen.git /tmp/binaryen
           cd /tmp/binaryen
+          git submodule update --init --depth 1
           cmake -G Ninja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr/local .
           ninja
           sudo ninja install
